---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability for Mackes Shell
title: '[feat] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The problem

What is missing or hard today? Describe the user behavior or workflow
that doesn't work well.

## The proposal

What would you like Mackes to do?

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've thought about (or are already doing manually).

## Scope hints (optional but helpful)

- Does this need a new GTK panel? A new birthright step? A new playbook?
- Does it require new dependencies? New systemd units?
- Does it conflict with any of the locked design decisions (see
  `~/.claude/.../memory/MEMORY.md` if you have history) — Carbon design
  system, ≤16-peer mesh, ansible-pull transport, etc.?

## Willing to PR?

- [ ] Yes — I'd like to implement this
- [ ] Maybe with mentorship
- [ ] No, this is a suggestion
